title: Fibonacci Generator
code:
def fibonacci():
    a, b = 0, 1
    while True:
        yield a
        a, b = b, a + b

gen = fibonacci()
first_ten = [next(gen) for _ in range(10)]
description: A generator function that produces an infinite Fibonacci sequence. `yield` suspends execution and returns a value; the next `next()` call resumes from that point. The tuple swap `a, b = b, a + b` updates both in one step without a temporary variable.
